productDisplayName: Puma Men Sports Pack of 3 Socks
description: Pack of three pairs of warm ankle length socks in white, navy and greyMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneBig chunky rib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitTerry-towelling inner for extreme comfort and warmthWear these super comfy socks to keep your feet cosy.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Sock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
